---
title: ""
title-block-style: none
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="theme-banner" style="--theme-bg: #7A3030;"><div class="banner-title">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</div><p class="banner-sub">1,664 posts where this was the primary topic.</p></div>
```


<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [9, 58, 102, 59, 78, 92, 85, 114, 176, 360, 3, 58, 122, 155, 156, 37],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#7A3030" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>new york</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>law enforcement</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>radical left</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>violent crime</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>united states</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>great again</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>make america</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>york city</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>police officers</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>president djt</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>enforcement officers</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>law order</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#7A3030'>america great</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="post-stream"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2012"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 17, 2012  13:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Under Mayor @ MikeBloomberg and Police Commissioner @ Ray Kelly all violent crime in NYC is down dramatically. That&#x27;s leadership.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_203196809869406210" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/203196809869406210" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 12, 2016  06:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Crime is out of control</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_752834632907943936" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/752834632907943936" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 27, 2016  21:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Shooting deaths of police officers up 78% this year. We must restore law and order and protect our great law enforcement officers!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_758491947409481728" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/758491947409481728" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 30, 2016  13:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Violent crime is rising across the United States</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_759450053379579905" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/759450053379579905" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2017  20:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If Chicago doesn&#x27;t fix the horrible &#x27;carnage&#x27; going on</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824080766288228352" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824080766288228352" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2017  19:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The crackdown on illegal criminals is merely the keeping of my campaign promise. Gang members</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_830741932099960834" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/830741932099960834" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 18, 2017  17:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The weak illegal immigration policies of the Obama Admin. allowed bad MS 13 gangs to form in cities across U.S. We are removing them fast!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_854268119774367745" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/854268119774367745" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2017  02:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Big progress being made in ridding our country of MS-13 gang members and gang members in general. MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_890642377131515904" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/890642377131515904" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 23, 2018  19:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;MS-13 gang members are being removed by our Great ICE and Border Patrol Agents by the thousands</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_966998215592677376" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/966998215592677376" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 26, 2018  06:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Chicago Police have every right to legally protest against the mayor and an administration that just won’t let them do their job. The killings are at a record pace and tough police work</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1000138164923781121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1000138164923781121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 12, 2019  23:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;So now they are after the legendary “crime buster” and greatest Mayor in the history of NYC</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1183037520503885824" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1183037520503885824" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 01, 2019  20:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Chicago will never stop its crime wave with the current Superintendent of Police. It just won’t happen! Thank you to Kevin Graham and all of the GREAT Chicago Police Officers I just had the privilege to meet. Tremendous crime fighting potential if allowed to do your thing!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1190247105841057805" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1190247105841057805" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 05, 2020  04:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Radical Left Democrats new theme is “Defund the Police”. Remember that when you don’t want Crime</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1268635752214208514" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1268635752214208514" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 07, 2020  21:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Sleepy Joe Biden and the Radical Left Democrats want to “DEFUND THE POLICE”. I want great and well paid LAW ENFORCEMENT. I want LAW &amp;amp; ORDER!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1269617458354282502" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1269617458354282502" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 06, 2020  05:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Democrats want to Defund &amp;amp; Abolish Police. This despite poor crime numbers in cities that they run. CRAZY!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1279890194653724672" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1279890194653724672" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 13, 2020  20:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Never in history have Police been treated so badly as they are in Democrat run cities - and these cities are a mess. Police must take a stronger stand with the Radical Left politicians that are treating them so badly</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1282647375257964544" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1282647375257964544" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 18, 2020  22:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A horrible Governor. Crime is taking over NYC &amp;amp; State</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1295726834865274880" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1295726834865274880" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 19, 2020  01:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats have to start enforcing Law and Order in their cities and states. New York City</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1295777044765143040" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1295777044765143040" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 31, 2020  04:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The only way you will stop the violence in the high crime Democrat run cities is through strength!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1300171130326716418" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1300171130326716418" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2021  20:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“As we speak, we are removing gang members, drug dealers and criminals that threaten our communities and prey on our citizens. #JointAddress”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_836763907566026752" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/836763907566026752" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 28, 2024  19:10</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">POLICE ARE THE GREATEST PEOPLE WE HAVE. THERE IS NOTHING, AND NOBODY LIKE THEM—THIS SHOULD NEVER HAPPEN…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112174893253643529" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112174893253643529" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 20, 2024  21:16</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: Crime in America is OUT OF CONTROL. I am going to make it, along with the economy, inflation, strong borders, and energy dominance, my TOP PRIORITY. The Democrats are holding their convention in Chicago in order to showcase it—and yet 117 people were shot, 17 killed, on the Fourth of July Weekend, and 40 were shot this weekend. That is a WAR ZONE, and will be handled accordingly. Mothers will no longer be losing their children because weak, liberal politicians have given up on securing a crime-free USA. I WILL STOP VIOLENT CRIME IN AMERICA!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112996422329201153" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112996422329201153" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 23, 2024  02:49</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">The Chaos and Calamity is allowing our Country to be infiltrated by Millions of Criminals!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113009058958667010" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113009058958667010" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 13, 2024  00:01</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">MASSIVE NEWS! The Department of Justice just released brand new Crime Data showing I was absolutely and completely right at the Debate. In fact, the Data is even worse than we could have ever imagined. Compared to 2020, Violent Crime is up nearly 40 percent, Rape is up 42 percent, Aggravated Assaults are up 55 percent, Violent Crime with a weapon is up 56 percent, Violent Attacks on strangers are up 61 percent, Car Theft is up 42 percent, and the most serious forms of Violent Crime are up 55 percent. Our Cities are UNDER SIEGE. And this does not include the Migrant Crime and Migrant Rape spree that has overtaken our Cities in recent months.  Kamala Crime is destroying America, and gangs are taking over!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113127305279271903" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113127305279271903" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2025  15:48</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">When I said that the criminals coming in are far worse than the criminals we have in our country, that statement was constantly refuted by Democrats and the Fake News Media, but it turned out to be true. The crime rate in our country is at a level that nobody has ever seen before. Our hearts are with all of the innocent victims and their loved ones, including the brave officers of the New Orleans Police Department. The Trump Administration will fully support the City of New Orleans as they investigate and recover from this act of pure evil!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113753883210775585" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113753883210775585" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 14, 2025  20:37</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">As we begin a proud new chapter in the chronicles of American Justice, we&#x27;re turning the page on four long years of corruption, weaponization, and surrender to violent criminals...</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114162707211212885" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114162707211212885" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 28, 2025  14:04</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Washington, D.C., must become CLEAN and SAFE again! We need our Great Police back on the street, with no excuses from the Mayor, or anyone else. The House should take up the D.C. funding âfixâ that the Senate has passed, and get it done IMMEDIATELY. We need to clean up our once beautiful Capital City, and make it beautiful again. We will be TOUGH ON CRIME, like never before. I will work with the Mayor on this and, if it does not happen, will have no choice but to do it myself. Washington, D.C., will be better, safer, and more beautiful than ever before!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114240434953893474" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114240434953893474" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 21, 2025  13:50</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crime in American Cities started to significantly rise when they went to CASHLESS BAIL. The WORST criminals are flooding our streets and endangering even our great law enforcement officers. It is a complete disaster, and must be ended, IMMEDIATELY!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114891542921713362" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114891542921713362" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 25, 2025  12:42</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">The incompetent Mayor of Chicago just stated that, in DC, where crime has been brought down to almost nothing, there have been no murders in 9 days, something which hasn&#x27;t happened in years, and people are safe again, only nine people have been arrested. That is wrong, hundreds of criminals have been held, captured, and arrested, and their guns have been taken away. DC IS SAFE AND BOOMING!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115089457027851323" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115089457027851323" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 01, 2025  01:30</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CRIME IS TOTALLY OUT OF CONTROL IN CHICAGO. 6 DEAD, 24 BADLY WOUNDED, LAST WEEK ALONE!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115126449469247578" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115126449469247578" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 01, 2025  11:41</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Wow! Mayor Muriel Bowser of D.C. has become very popular because she worked with me and my great people in bringing CRIME down to virtually NOTHING in D.C. Her statements and actions were positive, instead of others like Pritzker, Wes Moore, Newscum, and the 5% approval rated Mayor of Chicago, who spend all of their time trying to justify violent Crime, instead of working with us to completely ELIMINATE it, which we have done in Washington, D.C.,  NOW A CRIME FREE ZONE. Wouldn&#x27;t it be nice to say that about Chicago, Los Angeles, New York, and even the Crime Drenched City of Baltimore??? It can happen, and it can happen FAST! Work with us!!! Mayor Bowser&#x27;s ratings have gone up, in a short period of time, 25%, and the people of D.C. are thanking her for stopping crime wherever she goes. It&#x27;s not a miracle, it&#x27;s hard work, courage, and being SMART. The top Law Enforcement Officer in L.A. said, during the riots, and when I sent the troops in early, that they couldn&#x27;t have done it without us. They were completely overwhelmed! If we hadn&#x27;t gone in early, on top of the Palisades plus fires, L.A. would have lost the Olympics. Congratulations to Mayor Muriel Bowser, but don&#x27;t go Woke on us. D.C. is a GIANT VICTORY that never has to end!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115128853265372429" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115128853265372429" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 04, 2025  04:13</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">The Mayor and Governor should be begging me for help. Crime is out of control in Chicago, potentially one of the greatest cities in the World (Again!). I could fix it in one month! President DJT https://nypost.com/2025/09/02/us-news/chicagos-labor-day-weekend-bloodbath-sees-8-killed-58-shot-but-left-wing-mayor-vows-no-federal-troops-to-stop-the-violence/</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115144078281517668" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115144078281517668" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 15, 2025  04:54</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">The Federal Government, under my auspices as President of the United States of America, has stepped into the complete criminal mess that was Washington, D.C., our Nation&#x27;s Capital. Because of this, D.C. has gone from one of the most dangerous and murder ridden cities in the U.S.A., and even around the World, to one of the safest - In just a few weeks. The &quot;place&quot; is absolutely booming, with restaurants, stores, and businesses packed and, for the first time in decades, virtually NO CRIME. It has been a beautiful thing to watch but, now, under pressure from the Radical Left Democrats, Mayor Muriel Bowser, who has presided over this violent criminal takeover of our Capital for years, has informed the Federal Government that the Metropolitan Police Department will no longer cooperate with with ICE in removing and relocating dangerous illegal aliens. If I allowed this to happen, CRIME would come roaring back. To the people and businesses of Washington, D.C., DON&#x27;T WORRY, I AM WITH YOU, AND WON&#x27;T ALLOW THIS TO HAPPEN. I&#x27;ll call a National Emergency, and Federalize, if necessary!!! Thank you for your attention to this matter. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!!! President DJT</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115206527064725917" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115206527064725917" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 15, 2025  05:06</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">The Federal Government, under my auspices as President of the United States of America, has stepped into the complete criminal mess that was Washington, D.C., our Nation&#x27;s Capital. Because of this, D.C. has gone from one of the most dangerous and murder ridden cities in the U.S.A., and even around the World, to one of the safest - In just a few weeks. The &quot;place&quot; is absolutely booming, with restaurants, stores, and businesses packed and, for the first time in decades, virtually NO CRIME. It has been a beautiful thing to watch but, now, under pressure from the Radical Left Democrats, Mayor Muriel Bowser, who has presided over this violent criminal takeover of our Capital for years, has informed the Federal Government that the Metropolitan Police Department will no longer cooperate with ICE in removing and relocating dangerous illegal aliens. If I allowed this to happen, CRIME would come roaring back. To the people and businesses of Washington, D.C., DON&#x27;T WORRY, I AM WITH YOU, AND WON&#x27;T ALLOW THIS TO HAPPEN. I&#x27;ll call a National Emergency, and Federalize, if necessary!!! Thank you for your attention to this matter. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!!! President DJT</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115206570863756188" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115206570863756188" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 16, 2025  07:40</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @realDonaldTrumpThe only reason crime is somewhat down in Memphis is because the FBI, and others in the Federal Government, at my direction, have been working there for 5 months - on the absolutely terrible Crime numbers. Likewise, in Chicago and Los Angeles! But the real work by us has barely begun. That happens after we make the official announcement that WE&#x27;RE COMING, and when we do that, as we did in now VERY SAFE WASHINGTON, D.C., the no crime &quot;miracle&quot; begins. ONLY I CAN SAVE THEM!!! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DJT</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115212839080179321" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115212839080179321" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 18, 2025  22:06</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Our Raid on Chicago Illegals??? MAKE CHICAGO GREAT AGAIN!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115227570336805813" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115227570336805813" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 11, 2025  23:30</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">I am proud to announce that Chicago, Illinois, despite all of the radical opposition and obstruction we have from the Mayor and the Governor, has seen Car Theft, Shootings, Robberies, Violent Crime, and everything else, drop dramatically. Since the launch of the DHS operation &quot;Midway Blitz&quot; in Chicago only weeks ago, Shootings are down 35%, Robberies are down 41%, and Carjackings are down almost 50% — And this is with just a small initial Federal Force, not the full &quot;surge&quot; we have done in Chicago and Memphis. As we ramp up more assets, these numbers will continue to drop. This has been achieved despite the extraordinary resistance from Chicago and Illinois Radical Democrat &quot;Leadership,&quot; and the constant Violent Leftwing Terrorism against ICE Officers and Federal Agents that Insurrectionist Democrat Officials refuse to stop or prosecute, including constant physical assault and attempted assassination.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115533666048445520" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115533666048445520" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2026"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2026.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 13, 2026  13:40</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Do the people of Minnesota really want to live in a community in which there are thousands of already convicted murderers, drug dealers and addicts, rapists, violent released and escaped prisoners, dangerous people from foreign mental institutions and insane asylums, and other deadly criminals too dangerous to even mention. All the patriots of ICE want to do is remove them from your neighborhood and send them back to the prisons and mental institutions from where they came, most in foreign Countries who illegally entered the USA though Sleepy Joe Biden&#x27;s HORRIBLE Open Border&#x27;s Policy. Every place we go, crime comes down. In Chicago, despite a weak and incompetent Governor and Mayor fighting us all the way, a big improvement was made. Thousands of Criminals were removed! Minnesota Democrats love the unrest that anarchists and professional agitators are causing because it gets the spotlight off of the 19 Billion Dollars that was stolen by really bad and deranged people. FEAR NOT, GREAT PEOPLE OF MINNESOTA, THE DAY OF RECKONING &amp; RETRIBUTION IS COMING!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115888070937502023" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115888070937502023" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2026"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2026.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2026  16:16</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @realDonaldTrumpThe Department of Homeland Security and ICE must start talking about the murderers and other criminals that they are capturing and taking out of the system. They are saving many innocent lives! There are thousands of vicious  animals in Minnesota alone, which is why the crime stats are, Nationwide, the BEST EVER RECORDED! Show the Numbers, Names, and Faces of the violent criminals, and show them NOW. The people will start supporting the Patriots of ICE, instead of the highly paid troublemakers, anarchists, and agitators! MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115928321836846571" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115928321836846571" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2026"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2026.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 10, 2026  21:21</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Just two of the many brutal criminals we have captured in Memphis, making it 50% safer than it was just two months ago — More to follow!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_116206971915527868" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/116206971915527868" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div>
```


::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
